title: Laptop Won't Power On
description: Troubleshoot a laptop that is dead or black screening.

steps.instruction: Ensure the power adapter is firmly plugged into the wall and the laptop charging port.
Look for charging indicator lights on the laptop (usually next to the port or on the front edge). If no light is showing, the charger or socket might be dead.
Try holding the power button down for 30 seconds to perform a hard reset. Then release and press it once normally.
Disconnect any external devices (USB hubs, external monitors, docking stations) and try powering on the laptop barebones.
If the laptop still shows zero signs of life (no fan noise, no lights), it requires hardware service. Please raise a ticket with your Asset ID.
